runtime_evidence_scope: the standard compatibility path is local Traefik forwardAuth request-header rule 1000001: allow 200, block 403; separately, full-lifecycle-traefik-native selects native-middleware in a pinned local-plugin host and proves plugin loading and router traffic without rule evaluation
starter_evidence_note: legacy decision-service self-test remains non-runtime evidence
native_middleware_full_lifecycle_note: The full-lifecycle profile selects native-middleware through full-lifecycle-traefik-native in a pinned local-plugin host probe. It installs PassthroughEngine, has no Common/libmodsecurity bridge, and does not alter forwardAuth compatibility capability state or promote P1-P4, late-action, first-byte, or no-buffer claims.
